business_ideas.idea: Self-awareness test: personality test filled out by close circle (wife, parents, business partner)
360 degree feedback service for executives at $30K per assessment
Quiz-based personality test with viral social mechanism (how well do you know me)
Embryo selection service using AI to identify genetic markers for diseases, height, IQ
Cord blood freezing and stem cell banking for parents
Eye art business: print high-resolution magnified images of eyes as wall art or jewelry
Color analysis/color palette service: determine personal color scheme for clothing and makeup
Mold detection and cleanup service using Facebook ads to drive free inspections
Reposition UK national pride via Dunkirk Day instead of St. George's Day

predictions.text: Integrating personality test into executive coaching will double or triple lifetime customer value
Sex will become obsolete as a reproductive mechanism due to embryo selection technology
We're one of the last generations created via sex naturally
